zh.lifeSummary: 當Orabella Quincy於大約1200年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆時，她的父親Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester41歲，母親Margaret de Beaumont47歲。她和Sir Richard de Harcourt至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1258年之後在英國奧可福爾斯坦頓 聖 約翰，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利。

nameMeanings.name: Quincy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in France deriving their names from the Gallo-Roman personal name Quintus, meaning ‘fifth(-born)’ + the locative suffix -acum. The earliest bearer of the name in England, that of Saer de Quincy, ancestor of the earls of Winchester, was from Cuinchy in Pas-de-Calais, but the name may have been reinforced by immigrants from Quincy-sous-Sénard in Seine-et-Oise or Quincy-Voisins in Seine-et-Marne. A family of the name de Quincy held the title Earl of Winchester 1207–65. Descendants of this family later bore the name Quincey up to the time of the English essayist Thomas De Quincey (1785–1859), who changed his name from Quincey to De Quincey in 1796.

History: The American Quincy family were established in MA by Edmund Quincy in 1633. Fifth in descent was Josiah Quincy (1744–75), a leading patriot, who was sent to England to argue the colonists’ case in 1774. His son Josiah (1772–1864) was a powerful opponent of slavery, president of Harvard, and mayor of Boston, a post also held by several of his descendants. The traditional pronunciation is “Quinzy”.

nameMeanings.name: Orabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; probably an altered form of An(n)abella ( see Annabel ). It occurs in Scotland and the North of England from the 1600s onwards.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Orabella Quincy was born about 1200, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester, was 41 and her mother, Margaret de Beaumont, was 47. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Sir Richard de Harcourt. She died after 1258, in Stanton St John, Oxfordshire, England, and was buried in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Orabella Quincy est née environ 1200, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Beaumont, avait 47 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Sir Richard de Harcourt. Elle est décédée après 1258, à Stanton St John, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Brackley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

Sie hatte mit Sir Richard de Harcourt mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1258 in Stanton St John, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Sir Richard de Harcourt. Morì dopo il 1258, nel Stanton St John, Oxfordshire, England, e fu sepolta a Brackley, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Orabella Quincyが約1200年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターで生まれた時，父Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchesterは41歳，母Margaret de Beaumontは47歳であった。彼女はSir Richard de Harcourtとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1258年以後にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスタントン スト ジョンで死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブラックリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Orabella Quincy(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Beaumont(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 Sir Richard de Harcourt(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1258년 이후 영국 스퍼드실르 스탠턴 스트 존에서 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라클리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Orabella Quincy родилась около 1200 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Beaumont, 47. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Sir Richard de Harcourt. Она умерла после 1258 г. в местности стантон ст джон, оксфордшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности браккли, нортамптоншир, Англия.
